content: The official Art-Net 4 specification defines ArtPoll, ArtPollReply and ArtDmx as core packets, Port-Addressed universes, ArtDmx sequence numbering for order detection, and current unicast subscription behavior. A credible v1 therefore needs explicit network/interface and universe configuration, protocol-conformant packet generation, continuous output health metrics, and visible node/subscriber state; conformance and OEM attribution/code requirements must be tracked.
